category_sources: source_facts.description says glslang is an OpenGL and OpenGL ES reference compiler; official Khronos page describes Glslang as the official reference compiler front end.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is glslang; official Khronos GitHub repository is named glslang.
docs_sources: Official Khronos reference compiler page documents usage and points to the official GitHub source; official GitHub README documents command-line and build usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/KhronosGroup/glslang, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies OpenGL/OpenGL ES shader compilation; official Khronos and GitHub pages describe GLSL/ESSL front ends, HLSL support, and SPIR-V generation.
